## Required Knowledge

This is a fairly technical project which involves a reasonable amount of electronics and software, however, I've tried to make the steps simple enough that duplicating it should not require any in-depth knowledge of either field.

## Components

The list below contains all of the components I used to create this project. Similar components may be substituted but I cannot guarantee that the system 
will still work:

- Raspberry Pi 3B+
- Waveshare SIM868 module
- 4x4 Raspberry Pi Matrix Keypad 

## Software

Code snippets are provided throughout the project and the full codebase may be found on <a href="https://github.com/JasP19/IntercomPi" target="_blank">Github</a>
